raw_comment:
What do you notice?
There is a higher percentage of players than coaches, and a lower percentage in both players and coaches in the baseball league
What do you wonder?
We wonder why are there less head coaches of colour than players?
Impact on community?
 Less percentage of people of colour in the higher positions like coaches. Need more representation in those jobs of power.
What is going on in this graph?
They are comparing the percentages of players of colour & head coaches of colour in different sports leagues.
Catchy Title:
The Colour of Sports
